titleStmt.title: SII 26.731: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 731. (A.R. No. 680 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same shrine.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍya I: Year 3, Ṛishabha (Vaikāśi) śu. 11, Monday, Pūśam = Irregular: 13th century.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records a gift of a naṉdā lamp to be burnt in the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷamuḍaiyār of Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu by a certain Arayaṉ Śivaṉdakālaḻagiyār of Puduvūr in Ārvalak-kūṟṟam in Irāśēndiraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the donor paid a sum of 4,000 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu, the equivalent of 20-1/4 paṇam to the temple which sold to him for this purpose, some land from out of its tax-free tirunāmattukkāṇi village of Māṅkāṉam alias Nittamaṇavāḷanallūr and granted this sale deed (vilaippiramāṇa-iśaivut-tīṭṭu). It is stated that the taxes on the land would be paid by the temple.

The signatories were the different temple authorities like the temple accountant Perumbuliyūruḍaiyāṉ, the māḍāvattiyam Iḍarkaḷaivāṉ alias Aṟbudakālāṇḍāṉ, the śīmāhēśvarakaṇkāṇi Chaṇḍēśuranambi, another post (name lost) Araiyadēvan, and yet another kaṇkāṇi (detail lost) Tirujñānasambandaṉ. Besides, a few other individuals also figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī sundarapāṇṭiya(ya)tevaṟku yāṇṭu
muṉṟāvatu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pucattunāḷ pāṇṭikula
pativaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkuḷa Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkoyil Āti caṇṭeśvaratevakaṉmikaḷom
Iṟaiili nilavilaipramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Irācentiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ārvalak kūṟṟattu putuvūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ civaṉta
kālaḻakiyāṟku Iṟṟaināḷāl Iṉnāyaṉāṟkku tirunuṉtāviḷakkupuṟamāka Iṭṭa tiruviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṟṟukkuṭutta
Iṟaiili nilamāvatu pāṇṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu Iṉnāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyili māṅkāṉamāṉa nittamaṇavāḷanallūr
ka l muṉaca ṉ vayakkal nilam Irumāvaraiyum Itaṉ kiḻakku kāṭaṉ vayakkal nila mākāṇiyum
Āka Iṟaiyili nilam muṉṟumā mukkāṇikkum Iṉnilattāl varum mākkalakkaṭamaiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟuppomāka vi
ṟṟuk kuṭuttom viṟṟuk kuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa Emmilicaiṉta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu ṉālāyirattiṉāl vilai
paṇam Irupattukālum Āvaṉa kāṭpeṟṟa kaiccelavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇa Icaivu
tiṭṭuk kuṭutta Iṉnilattu melnokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavu
m Uḷppaṭa viṟṟukkuṭuttom putuvūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ civantakālaḻakiyārkku Ādicaṇḍeśvarate
vakaṉmikaḷom Ippaṭi Eḻutineṉ koyil kaṇakku perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu māṭāvattiyam
Iṭarkaḷaivānāṉa Aṟputakālāṇṭāṉeḻuttu cimāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi caṇṭecuranam(p)pi
Eḻuttu ta ma Araiyatevaṉeḻuttu ṇ kāṇi tiruñāṉacampaṉtareḻuttu tevar
�maṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ keyamāṇikka ṅ kattu virairāceṉ(t)tira coḻappira
yaneṉ civarāmanampi ruppa
Digital edition of SII 26.731 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
